Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause re: preliminary injunction and Temporary Restraining Order. Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 922-5939, specially appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Joe J. Solseng, Esq. of Robinson Tait PS (206) 676-9640 appearing for Defendants and opposing party. Hearing held and argued. Ruling: Motion for preliminary injunction to stay foreclosure is granted. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare proposed Order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
